readinessScoring: Binary GO completion only; 0 means the Industrial Integration-Ready gate is not yet accepted. It is not an implementation-progress estimate.

#2287 Runtime separation of auth and deal PostgreSQL principals
#2291 Forward-only backup, restore and isolated DR rehearsal

remainingBoundaries: IR-70 production load, HA and operations

durableOutboxWorkerImplementation.remainingBoundary: IR-20 must remove the legacy process-memory relay and enforce one production owner.

openBlockers: Labs, Settlement reads/commands and Disputes can still bind process-memory repositories.
Laboratory sample custody, test facts, accreditation basis and protocol finalization are not yet PostgreSQL-authoritative.
Legacy OutboxRelayService and process-memory OutboxService still coexist with DurableOutboxWorker.
Inbound webhook idempotency is process-memory and no durable integration inbox exists.
Partner API credentials and webhook subscriptions are process-memory.
Canonical Auction/Deal Basis and versioned Payment Terms are incomplete; winnerBidId is carried in a legacy field.
Evidence object retention, malware quarantine and repeatable signature verification are not accepted.
Adapter conformance, vendor mappings and fail-closed live configuration are incomplete.
Role cabinets and offline acknowledgement are not fully proven against authoritative server state.
Production configuration, dedicated worker topology, SLO operations, HA, provider PITR/restore, production-scale load and external security acceptance are unproven.
blockerNotes: Merged Deal, identity, Documents, Logistics, reconciliation and durable-worker slices are retained as exact-commit evidence only. Industrial Integration-Ready remains NO-GO until every mandatory gate through IR-90 has accepted evidence.
lockedUntilCurrentGreen: IR-22 Persistent Partner API and Outbound Webhooks
IR-30 through IR-90 in dependency order
currentAcceptance: Production LabsModule binds LAB_REPOSITORY directly to a complete Prisma implementation; RuntimeCore, optional Prisma and repository factory are absent from the production Labs dependency graph.
Production startup fails closed when the lab repository mode is missing, memory or unknown.
Sample reads and custody mutations execute in trusted server-derived RLS transactions and deny cross-tenant and same-tenant nonparticipant access.
Laboratory actor, sample custody, method, equipment, accreditation basis and protocol authority are normalized and cannot be supplied as client authority.
Collection, handoff, receipt, testing and finalization use an explicit state machine with optimistic concurrency and durable idempotency.
Each lab mutation commits sample/test state, append-only custody fact, audit and PENDING outbox together or rolls back together.
Finalized protocol facts are immutable and linked to verified evidence; corrections create explicit superseding records rather than overwriting confirmed facts.
Restart, second-instance, concurrent mutation, same-tenant outsider and cross-tenant denial are proven on restricted PostgreSQL principals.
No fake accreditation, live laboratory connection or external protocol upload claim is introduced.
Forward migration succeeds on empty and baseline databases, drift is empty, restricted-principal RLS and exact-head CI are green.
nextAfterCurrentGreen: IR-22 Persistent Partner API and Outbound Webhooks
IR-30 Canonical Deal and Payment Basis
IR-32 Lab, Documents and Disputes State Machines
IR-50 Adapter Conformance followed by IR-51 through IR-55
IR-60 and IR-61 Role UI, Offline, Localization and Accessibility
IR-70 through IR-72 Production Profile, Operations, Load, HA and DR
readiness: NO-GO. Logistics PostgreSQL authority is merged at a272a1e6. Labs, Settlement, Disputes, single outbox ownership, durable inbox/partner state, canonical evidence, production operations, HA/DR/load and external security acceptance remain open.
